creator: oliver.giersch@b-tu.de
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #1)
 I should have mentioned it, but this is with the following loader.conf options (EFI boot):

boot_multicons="YES"
boot_serial="YES"
console="comconsole"

I was under the impression that these settings are for enabling the serial console, but that the vt_efifb was probed nonetheless, but apparently I'm wrong? If so, I apologize for the false report.
